mapper.select: SELECT s.stage_id, s.project_id, s.name, s.description, s.order_index, s.start_date, s.end_date, s.status, COUNT(tk.task_id) AS task_count, SUM(CASE WHEN tl.name = '已完成' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed_count FROM stages s LEFT JOIN tasks tk ON s.stage_id = tk.stage_id LEFT JOIN task_lists tl ON tk.list_id = tl.list_id WHERE s.project_id = #{projectId} GROUP BY s.stage_id, s.project_id, s.name, s.description, s.order_index, s.start_date, s.end_date, s.status ORDER BY s.order_index ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tasks WHERE stage_id = #{stageId}
